name: Irish Bread with Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. Sift flour, baking powder, salt, and soda into a bowl.
3. Cream shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg and sour cream; mix well.
5. Stir the sour cream mixture into the flour mixture.
6. Mix until well blended.
7. Fold in raisins and currants.
8. Spoon batter into a greased 2-quart casserole.
9. Bake for 50 minutes. Cover with aluminum foil and bake an additional 10 minutes, or until done.
10. Makes one round 8-inch loaf.
